pinyin: nǐ xiǎng zhī dào wèi shén me wǒ duì shuō huà ma
english: Do you want to know why I lied to Tom?

zh: 这里一个人都没有。大家都去哪了?
pinyin: zhè lǐ yī gè rén dōu méi yǒu dà jiā dōu qù nǎ le
english: There's no one here. Where is everyone?

zh: 那个是我的。我不知道你的在哪里。
pinyin: nà gè shì wǒ de wǒ bù zhī dào nǐ de zài nǎ lǐ
english: That's mine. I don't know where yours is.

zh: 我不能和你们一起去，因为我很忙。
pinyin: wǒ bù néng hé nǐ men yī qǐ qù yīn wèi wǒ hěn máng
english: I can't go with you because I'm very busy.

zh: 我想和你一起去，但是我没有时间。
pinyin: wǒ xiǎng hé nǐ yī qǐ qù dàn shì wǒ méi yǒu shí jiān
english: I would have liked to come with you, but I didn't have time.

pinyin: wèi shén me nǐ bù lái yīn wèi wǒ bù xiǎng
english: "Why aren't you going?" "Because I don't want to."

zh: "你为什么不去？""因为我不想去。"
pinyin: nǐ wèi shén me bù qù yīn wèi wǒ bù xiǎng qù
english: "Why aren't you going?" "Because I don't want to."

zh: “你什么时候回来？”“这都要看天气。”
pinyin: nǐ shén me shí hòu huí lái zhè dōu yào kàn tiān qì
english: "When will you be back?" "It all depends on the weather."
